changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_org_unit AS WITH base AS ( SELECT ou.id, ou.uid, ou.code, ou.name, ou.level::int AS level_int, ou.parent_id, ou.path, COALESCE(ou.translations, '[]'::jsonb) AS translations, regexp_split_to_array(trim(BOTH ',' FROM coalesce(ou.path, '')), ',') AS path_array, ou.properties_map, ou.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(ou.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(ou.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.org_unit ou ) SELECT b.id AS org_unit_id, b.uid AS org_unit_uid, b.code AS org_unit_code, b.name AS org_unit_name, b.level_int, b.parent_id, b.path AS path_text, b.path_array, (SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('uid', ou2.uid, 'name', ou2.name, 'level', ou2.level) ORDER BY ord) FROM unnest(b.path_array) WITH ORDINALITY AS t(uid, ord) JOIN public.org_unit ou2 ON ou2.uid = t.uid ) AS ancestors, (SELECT ou2.name FROM public.org_unit ou2 WHERE ou2.uid = (b.path_array[1]) LIMIT 1) AS country, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(b.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'en', 'name'), b.name)) AS org_unit_name_en, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(b.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'ar', 'name'), b.name)) AS org_unit_name_ar, (SELECT ou2.name FROM public.org_unit ou2 WHERE ou2.uid = (b.path_array[2]) LIMIT 1) AS governorate, (SELECT ou2.name FROM public.org_unit ou2 WHERE ou2.uid = (b.path_array[3]) LIMIT 1) AS district, (SELECT ou2.name FROM public.org_unit ou2 WHERE ou2.uid = (b.path_array[4]) LIMIT 1) AS level_3_name, (SELECT ou2.name FROM public.org_unit ou2 WHERE ou2.uid = (b.path_array[5]) LIMIT 1) AS level_4_name, b.properties_map as attributes_map_json, b.last_modified_by, (b.source_last_modified_at::timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM base b;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_org_unit;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql:
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_org_unit_group AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_org_unit_group_id, g.id AS org_unit_group_id, g.uid AS org_unit_group_uid, g.code AS org_unit_group_code, g.name AS org_unit_group_name, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(g.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'en', 'name'), g.name)) AS org_unit_group_name_en, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(g.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'ar', 'name'), g.name)) AS org_unit_group_name_ar, COALESCE(g.properties_map::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb) AS properties_jsonb, g.inactive, g.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(g.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(g.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.org_unit_group g;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_org_unit_group_member AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS id, gm.group_id AS org_unit_group_id, g.uid AS org_unit_group_uid, gm.org_unit_id, ou.uid AS org_unit_uid, GREATEST(COALESCE(g.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(g.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.org_unit_group_members gm LEFT JOIN public.org_unit_group g ON g.id = gm.group_id LEFT JOIN public.org_unit ou ON ou.id = gm.org_unit_id;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_org_unit_group_member; DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_org_unit_group;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_org_unit_slm ON analytics.dim_org_unit (source_last_modified_at);

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_org_unit_slm;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_org_unit_uid_uniq ON analytics.dim_org_unit (org_unit_uid);

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_org_unit_uid_uniq;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_org_unit_slm_uid ON analytics.dim_org_unit (source_last_modified_at, org_unit_uid);

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_org_unit_slm_uid;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_org_unit_group_slm ON analytics.dim_org_unit_group (source_last_modified_at);

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_org_unit_group_slm;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_org_unit_group_uid_uniq ON analytics.dim_org_unit_group (org_unit_group_uid);

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_org_unit_group_slm_uid ON analytics.dim_org_unit_group (source_last_modified_at, org_unit_group_uid);

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_org_unit_group_slm_uid;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_org_unit_group_member_uid_uniq ON analytics.dim_org_unit_group_member (org_unit_uid, org_unit_group_uid);

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_analytics_dim_org_unit_group_member_slm_uid ON analytics.dim_org_unit_group_member (source_last_modified_at, org_unit_uid, org_unit_group_uid);
